case_title: SECRETARY OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT vs. LEWIS, SHARON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRETARY OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT SERVED AUG-16-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, SHARON
